title: Audit ferrolearn-tree vs sklearn (tree + ensemble): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 3 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.tree (DecisionTreeClassifier/Regressor, ExtraTreeClassifier/Regressor, export_graphviz, export_text) and sklearn.ensemble (RandomForestClassifier/Regressor, ExtraTreesClassifier/Regressor, GradientBoostingClassifier/Regressor, HistGradientBoostingClassifier/Regressor, AdaBoostClassifier/Regressor, BaggingClassifier/Regressor, VotingClassifier/Regressor, StackingClassifier/Regressor, IsolationForest, RandomTreesEmbedding).

Related existing issues: #48-55 (tree pruning, splitter, max_leaf_nodes, monotonic_cst, sample_weight, warm_start, oob_score, export_graphviz, export_text)
